data.title: Saronic Closes $1.75B Series D at $9.25B Valuation to Accelerate a New Era of Maritime Autonomy
data.description: In Austin, Texas on March 31, 2026, Saronic Technologies revealed the completion of a $1.75 billion Series D funding round. The company aims to enhance maritime dominance for the U.S. and its partners by providing large-scale autonomous solutions for both defense and commercial sectors.

data.title: New Oriental to Report Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 22, 2026
data.description: On March 31, 2026, New Oriental Education and Technology Group Inc., a leading provider of private educational services in China, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the third quarter. The company, listed on the NYSE as EDU and on the 9901.SEHK, will provide details on its performance during that period.

data.title: Oracle and NetSuite Deliver New AI-Powered Solution for Restaurant Operations
data.description: Oracle and Oracle NetSuite have revealed a new solution, Oracle NetSuite Restaurant Operations, designed to centralize key back-office functions tailored for modern restaurant and hospitality businesses. This unified offering aims to meet the specific demands of the industry. The announcement was made at SuiteConnect London on March 31, 2026. This centralized solution is expected to streamline operations and support businesses in the sector.

data.title: Approaching $1 Billion, Torani Expands Manufacturing & Adds Jobs as Industry Cuts Continue
data.description: A California-based company, Torani, has revealed its ambitious goal of exceeding $1 billion in revenue by the year 2030. This growth trajectory is fueled by their unique manufacturing approach that integrates chances for advancement directly within their operational framework. Torani, a prominent player in the flavor industry, has consistently achieved an impressive average annual growth rate of over 20% for 35 years. Notably, the company has not resorted to any layoffs in its century-long history, a rare feat amidst the current trend of downsizing in the manufacturing sector across the United States. In contrast, Torani is actively enhancing its production capacity, showcasing a commitment to sustained growth and job creation.

data.title: Resilience Care Expands to U.S. Market, Adds Veteran Digital Health Leaders to Support Growth with Oncology Providers
data.description: A cutting-edge digital oncology solution has been developed to address clinical gaps in cancer care through a holistic approach. Greg Orr, a prominent digital health professional and ex-COO of Jasper Health, has been designated as the new General Manager for the U.S. The appointment was announced on March 31, 2026, in Boston, marking a significant advancement in cancer care services. This initiative aims to improve patient outcomes by providing comprehensive and continuous support throughout their cancer journey.

data.title: Process W-2 & W-3 Corrections, In-House with efile ezW2Correction. No Outsourcing Required
data.description: Halfpricesoft.com, a software provider based in REDMOND, Wash., has recently emphasized the importance of rectifying errors on W-2 forms promptly to prevent potentially expensive issues for businesses. Through their ezW2Correction software, companies can easily import previous data and make necessary corrections before submission. This software aims to streamline the correction process and mitigate the risks associated with inaccurate information on important tax forms. Time is of the essence, as errors left unattended can lead to financial repercussions. Business owners are encouraged to take advantage of this tool to ensure accurate and compliant W-2 submissions.

data.title: Thunes Joins Swift and Visa as a Global Cross-Border Payments Leader
data.description: Thunes has been recognized as one of the top three global leaders in cross-border payments infrastructure by Juniper Research, due to its successful achievement of 'strong interoperability' across various rails and markets. The company, based in Singapore, was praised for its efficient money transfer services. This recognition highlights Thunes' exceptional performance in the industry, positioning them as a key player in the international payment landscape.

data.description: The cryptocurrency CRV is currently trading at $0.21 amidst a downward market trend. However, technical analysis indicates a possible increase to $0.26 if buyers can maintain support at $0.20 throughout April.

data.title: FLOKI price in consolidation with RSI at 41.64, indicating neutral momentum. Limited signals seen amid bearish MACD.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is experiencing a period of stability in trading, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently at 41.64, indicating a neutral momentum. According to technical analysis, there are few definitive signals regarding the direction of the market, as the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) histogram is displaying bearish readings. This suggests a lack of strong trends in either direction for FLOKI at this time.

data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund redeemed early part of the bonds
data.description: Baltic Horizon Fund recently revealed plans to partially redeem bonds issued on May 8, 2023 (ISIN code: EE3300003235) through a stock exchange announcement on March 10, 2026. The fund successfully carried out this redemption on March 31, 2026, redeeming bonds worth EUR 7,499,998.80. Prior to the redemption, the total nominal amount of the bonds stood at EUR 18,999,997.80, which decreased to EUR 11,499,999 after the redemption. This partial redemption caused a shift in the nominal value of the bonds, resulting in a new nominal value of EUR 27,380.95 per bond.

data.title: Toncoin is oversold at $1.23, with RSI at 41.42. CoinCodex projects TON to hit $1.63 by March-end, up 33% from current levels.
data.description: Toncoin is currently experiencing oversold conditions at a value of $1.23, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 41.42. According to CoinCodex, they predict that the value of TON will rise to $1.63 by March 31. This forecast indicates a 33% potential increase from its current value.
